generate.title: Generate onboarding tour
generate.body: DevDigest indexes the repo and specs, then writes a 5-section guided tour: overview, architecture, key modules, getting started, and conventions & gotchas.

addRepo.title: Add a repository
addRepo.introBeforeLink: Paste a GitHub repository URL — DevDigest clones it locally and imports open PRs. API keys aren’t needed here; set them once in
